field.label: Created at
field.description: The date and time this object was created

field.label: Customer

import.hint: The customer is the company or person who is paying for the shipment. Look for labels like "Bill To", "Bill Freight To", "Customer", "Billed To", or "Third Party". Extract only the company/person name — address details belong in other fields.

examples.inputText:
BILL FREIGHT TO:
ACME Logistics Inc
123 Main Street
Toronto, ON M5V 2T6

matchingCriteria.additionalInstructions: Consider email address and website domains if they are present

field.description: The customer for the order

field.label: origin City
field.description: cool stuff

field.label: Source
field.description: Where this object came from

field.label: Custom money
field.description: test

field.label: Requested pickup

import.hint:
Always derive from the first stop whose type is "Pick"
If that stop shows an "appointment" indicator (APPT, APPOINTMENT, DROP APPT, DELIVERY APPT, PICKUP APPT, SCHD/SCHED, or Scheduled Time), treat it as a strict point-in-time:
- dateTimeInLocation === dateTimeInLocationEnd (same value). Both dateTimeInLocation and dateTimeInLocationEnd must be identical to that fixed‑appointment timestamp.

Otherwise build the window from that stop's own earliest and latest timestamps (e.g. PLAN → ETA).

field.description: A date range that the customer is requesting the load be picked up within

field.label: Requested delivery

import.hint:
Always derive from the last stop whose type is “Drop”
If that stop shows an “appointment” indicator (APPT, APPOINTMENT, DROP APPT, DELIVERY APPT, PICKUP APPT, SCHD/SCHED, or Scheduled Time), treat it as a strict point-in-time:
- dateTimeInLocation === dateTimeInLocationEnd (same value). Both dateTimeInLocation and dateTimeInLocationEnd must be identical to that fixed‑appointment timestamp.

Otherwise build the window from that stop's own earliest and latest timestamps (e.g. PLAN → ETA).

field.description: A date range that the customer is requesting the load be delivered within

field.label: Actual pickup date
field.description: The specific date and time when the load is picked up

field.description: Shipper is the origin of the load

field.label: Status
field.description: The status of the order

field.label: Connections
field.description: Records that are related to the order, for example emails, quotes, etc. that have been created or updated by the order.

field.label: Full ID
field.description: Human-readable identifier for manifest

field.label: Equipment
field.description: This represents the type of equipment the carrier must have

field.label: Invoices
field.description: Invoices connected to the order

field.label: PO number

import.hint: !!! IMPORTANT - CRITICAL FIELD - Look for labels: PO#, PO Number, Purchase Order, P.O., Customer PO, Shipper PO, PO Num. Often appears near receiver/consignee information. Extract the alphanumeric reference exactly as shown.

field.description: A purchase order number is typically provided by the receiver, and captures an order to for example restock inventory at a warehouse

field.label: Ref number

import.hint: !!! IMPORTANT -CRITICAL FIELD - Look for labels: Ref#, Reference, Reference Number, Order Ref, Customer Ref, Booking Number, Ref Num. This is the primary general-purpose reference identifier. Prefer this field if only one reference number is visible and the label is ambiguous.

field.description: The ref num is a general purpose field to store reference ids from other system. Prefer this over loadTenderNum if available

field.label: Current location
field.description: The current location of the order

field.label: Load tender number

import.hint: !!! IMPORTANT -CRITICAL FIELD - Look for labels: Load Tender#, Tender Number, BOL#, Bill of Lading, Shipper Ref, Carrier Ref, Load Number, Load Tender Num. Common on rate confirmations and BOL documents from shipper to carrier.

field.description: A reference number for a load provided by the shipper that a carrier will often use to reference a BOL or order

field.label: Asset with last known location
field.description: Returns the asset with the last known location on an order

field.label: Assets
field.description: Assets that are on all of the tasks & subtasks on the order

field.label: Asset type
field.description: The type of asset required for the order

field.label: Commodities
field.description: Commodities connected to tasks on the order

field.label: Partner
field.description: The partner assigned to the order. Populated if a single partner is assigned to the entire order.

field.label: Created by user id
field.description: The user id that created this object

field.label: Customs broker
field.description: The customs broker for the order

field.label: Invoice
field.description: The first invoice associated with the order. This field is deprecated in favor of invoices.

field.label: Tracking enabled
field.description: Indicates if tracking is enabled for the order

field.label: Delivery ETA
field.description: Estimated time of arrival for a delivery

field.label: Driver name
field.description: Driver name for order tracking

field.label: Concat TEst
field.expression: concat('Last delivery at: ', {deliveryCompletionDateTime__c}, ', First delivery at:', {deliveredAt})

field.label: Last updated
field.description: Last updated based on timestamp of last MP location ping

field.label: Data source label
field.description: Returns the source of the Macropoint tracking information

field.label: Formatted Address with Company Name Label
field.description: Formatted Address

field.description: Partner tariffs assigned to the order

field.description: Customer tariff assigned to the order

field.label: Total earnings
field.description: Sum of line items on associated sell quote

field.label: Margin
field.description: The order's margin

field.label: Customer quote
field.description: The quote that the customer sees

field.label: Partners
field.description: Partners assigned to the order

field.label: Customer credit limit
field.description: The maximum allowable credit limit for the customer

field.description: The current available credit limit for the customer

field.label: Delivery ETA Last Updated
field.description: The last date and time the ETA was updated

field.label: Partner quotes
field.description: An array of buy quotes for multi partner order. These quotes captures the cost of this order.

field.label: Active
field.description: Whether this object is active or not.

field.label: Document count
field.description: The number of documents attached to an order and its related tasks, manifests and sub-tasks

field.label: Documents
field.description: Documents associated with the order

field.label: Actual delivery date
field.description: The specific date and time when the load is delivered

field.label: Delivery ETA Last Updated (Elapsed Time)
field.description: Human-readable duration of time since the last update on the delivery ETA.

field.label: Total Margin (Home)
field.description: Total margin converted to home currency - defaulted to creation date.
